projectDescription: Realistic medical training scenarios with advanced vital simulation, assessment modes, and comprehensive case management

userStories.title: Fix TypeScript type errors in VitalSignsMonitor
userStories.description: Resolve all TypeScript type mismatches in VitalSignsMonitor.tsx including number/string conversions and undefined checks
acceptanceCriteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
All vital sign values properly typed

userStories.title: Integrate Time-Based Deterioration System
userStories.description: Connect deteriorationSystem.ts to VitalSignsMonitor so patient vitals deteriorate realistically without treatment
acceptanceCriteria: Vitals decrease over time without intervention
Warning signs appear as patient worsens
Critical alarms trigger at appropriate thresholds

userStories.title: Implement Procedure Time Tracking
userStories.description: Add realistic procedure durations with step-by-step progress for IV, intubation, nebulizer, etc.

userStories.title: Connect Equipment Management System
userStories.description: Integrate equipmentSystem.ts so equipment must be applied before vitals visible
acceptanceCriteria: BP cuff required for blood pressure

userStories.title: Add Mass Casualty Incident Mode
userStories.description: Implement multi-patient scenarios with START triage system

userStories.title: Integrate Environmental Factors
userStories.description: Connect environmentalSystem.ts for heat, altitude, weather effects

userStories.title: Implement Cultural/Family Dynamics
userStories.description: Add family scenarios with cultural protocols

userStories.title: Create Transport Decision System
userStories.description: Add realistic transport mode and hospital selection

userStories.title: Add Scene Safety Evolution
userStories.description: Implement dynamic hazards that change over time

userStories.title: Optimize Bundle Size
userStories.description: Reduce JavaScript bundle size through code splitting

userStories.title: Add Comprehensive Documentation
userStories.description: Document all systems with AGENTS.md files
